DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF JOSHUA RUXIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND FOR SANCTIONS - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ONE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES BY AUGUST 15, 2011. AS TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, COURT WILL ISSUE SANCTIONS HOWEVER PARTIES TO SUBMIT FURTHER BRIEFS AS TO THE AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE AN ACCOUNTING BY 08/05/11 FOR BRINGING THIS MOTION. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE DUE 08/12/11, AT WHICH TIME THE COURT WILL TAKE THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COURTESY COPIES TO BE LODGED WITH DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED. SUBMITTED ON AUG-12-2011 BY LORETTA GIORGI.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses And For Sanctions; Separate Statement
Off Calendar Nov-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF JOSHUA RUXIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Michael Cohen, Esq. of Law Offices of Bruce E. Krell 861-4414 for pltf & moving party; Paul A. De Lorimier, Esq. of Law Offices McKay, De Lorimier & Acain 213/386-6900 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as to the following - Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories Set One, Special Interrogatories Set One, and Request for Production of Documents Set One is granted. Defendant must provide complete responses by August 15, 2011.
As to plaintiff's request for sanctions, Court will issue sanctions however parties to submit further briefs as to the amount of sanctions. Plaintiff to provide an accounting by 08/05/11 for bringing this motion. Defendant's response due 08/12/11, at which time the Court will take the matter under submission. Courtesy copies to be lodged with Department 302. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Set For Trial On Nov-21-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-04-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 525

JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses And For Sanctions; Separate Statement
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Jul-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOSHUA RUXIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS.
Appearances: Nancy A. Ramsey of McKay, DeLorimer & Acain (213.386.6900) for defendant and responding party. No other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to July 28, 2011. Defendant to provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/LMG) Judge Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
-------------
After hearing, Ms. Ramsey indicated she will mail a copy of the opposition to the department.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2011 Assigned To Arbitration On Jul-25-11; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Sep-06-11 At 09:00 A.M.
